name: Acorda, Portugese Bread Soup
recipeIngredient: 5-14 oz cans of brown broth (medium soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor with steel blade, process the chicken stock and bread crusts until smooth.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add salt and cayenne pepper to taste.
4. Serve immediately or let it cool on a back burner for hours.
5. Freeze individual portions for quick bread-and-soup lunches.
This hearty, creamy soup is native to south-coastal Portugal where it is commonly served with cod steaks or a cod casserole often called "Bacalhau a Gomes de sa". Serve hot topped with freshly baked melba toasts (made from leftover bread, 1/4-in slices in a convection/micro oven, 60 min at 275°F).
